/usr/bin/aarch64-linux-gnu-g++ --sysroot=/mnt CMakeFiles/test-ocr.dir/test-ocr.cpp.o -o test-ocr   -L/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/algorithm/ocr  -L/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/lapack  -L/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/blas  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/EASY-EAI-Toolkit/EASY-EAI-Toolkit-3562/easyeai-api/algorithm/ocr:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/lapack:/usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/blas -locr -lrknnrt -lopencv_core -lopencv_imgproc -lopencv_imgcodecs -lpthread -lstdc++
